Dialog.name: MSG_735_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 5 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 2}Everyone's always protecting me and getting hurt because of it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_735_2_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 6 0 2}Fuuka, I need you to back me up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_735_2_4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 7 0 2}I'll hold this thing off until everyone else gets here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_735_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 8 0 2}When someone gets hurt, I need to be there for them... because I have the power to help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_735_3_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 10 0 6}Yukari-chan! Load the cartridge into your Evoker![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_735_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Theurgy can be activated on your turn when your TP is at max. Unlike normal skills, they do not cost HP or SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_735_1_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can activate Theurgy by pressing R2.[n]{f 1 1}
